name: Lou Malnati's
teaser: Go pay your respects and order the butter crust. Deep dish is harder to kill than a werewolf — take one home on the plane.
review: Oh look, another guy not from Chicago saying you gotta try Lou's. How revolutionary. I don't care, go pay your respects and order the butter crust. Also, feel free to take one home on the plane — deep dish is harder to kill than a werewolf.
headsUp: Get the butter crust. Non-negotiable. And yes, take one home on the plane.
update: Ubiquitous but the original locations are still excellent.
